message:
fix(ci): Remove PYTHONPATH override for CPython reference tests

CPython reference tests were failing due to version mismatch when
PYTHONPATH pointed to CPython source repo's Lib directory.

Root cause:
- PYTHONPATH=/tmp/cpython/Lib overrode Python's built-in Lib
- Source repo Lib directory is for building Python, not running tests
- Caused AttributeError for missing attributes in sys.flags

Fixes:
- Remove CPython checkout step (not needed)
- Remove PYTHONPATH environment variable
- Use `python -m test test_name` to run tests with built-in test module
- Python 3.14 from actions/setup-python has correct test modules built-in

This ensures CPython reference tests run correctly without version conflicts.

Fixed 6 CPython test jobs:
- test-cpython-core1 (98 tests)
- test-cpython-core2 (98 tests)
- test-cpython-core3 (98 tests)
- test-cpython-linux (18 tests)
- test-cpython-macos (25 tests)
- test-cpython-windows (93 tests)

files.patch:
@@ -444,22 +444,15 @@ jobs:
         with:
           python-version: ${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}
 
-      - name: Checkout CPython test infrastructure
-        run: |
-          git clone --depth 1 --filter=blob:none --sparse --branch v3.14.2 https://github.com/python/cpython.git /tmp/cpython
-          cd /tmp/cpython
-          git sparse-checkout set Lib/test
-
       - name: Run CPython tests (core1)
-        env:
-          PYTHONPATH: /tmp/cpython/Lib
         run: |
           cd tests/cpython
           PASSED=0; FAILED=0; TOTAL=0
           while IFS= read -r test || [ -n "$test" ]; do
             [ -z "$test" ] && continue
             TOTAL=$((TOTAL + 1))
-            if python test_${test}.py 2>&1; then
+            # Use Python's built-in test module
+            if python -m test test_${test} 2>&1; then
               PASSED=$((PASSED + 1))
             else
               FAILED=$((FAILED + 1))
@@ -474,7 +467,10 @@ jobs:
           echo "| ❌ Failed | $FAILED |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
           echo "| 📋 Total | $TOTAL |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
           echo "| 📈 Pass Rate | ${RATE}% |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-          [ "$FAILED" -gt 0 ] && exit 1 || true
+          if [ "$FAILED" -gt 0 ]; then
+            echo "❌ Tests failed: $FAILED/$TOTAL"
+            exit 1
+          fi
         timeout-minutes: 30
 
   test-cpython-core2:

             if ($test -eq "") { return }
             $total++
-            $result = python "test_$test.py" 2>&1
